acceptanceSignals: Production deploy consumes production overlay artifacts and emits evidence.

lastCommit.message: feat: implement CI/CD Expansion and Release Gates (attempt 1)

attempts.latestEventSummary: feature completed: CI/CD Expansion and Release Gates in 0 attempts

reinforcementResults.name: Contract Lockstep Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: Reviewed the workspace in read-only mode and found no current-feature blockers. The required workflows exist (`image-build`, `migration-check`, `e2e-smoke`, `load-gate`, `deploy`), migration CI enforces reversible up/down (`sqlx migrate run` then `sqlx migrate revert --target-version 0` with invariant and clean-revert checks), and the deploy pipeline gates promotion on build/migration/smoke/load, consumes production overlay artifacts, and emits `ISS-005` release evidence. Contract policy is wired through `openapi-contract.yml` and `contract:verify` (`contract:sync` + generated client type-check + drift check), keeping backend handlers, OpenAPI artifacts, and generated TS client synchronized as one interface boundary.

reinforcementResults.name: Release Pipeline Integrity Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: No policy blockers found for this feature in the current workspace. The required CI/CD workflows are present (`image-build`, `migration-check`, `e2e-smoke`, `load-gate`, `deploy`), gate workflows are wired to PR/main push triggers, migration CI enforces reversible up/down (`sqlx migrate run` + `revert --target-version 0` + clean-schema assertion), and production deploy is gated by all release checks via `needs`, consumes production overlay artifacts, and emits `ISS-005` release evidence. Residual gap: this review is static (workflow/script audit); I could not execute GitHub Actions runs in this environment.

reinforcementResults.name: No-Legacy/Fallback Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: Pass on current feature scope. The workspace includes the required `image-build`, `migration-check`, `e2e-smoke`, `load-gate`, and `deploy` workflows; migration CI enforces reversible up/down plus clean revert; deploy consumes production overlay artifacts and emits release evidence (`ISS-005`); smoke gate covers employee/vendor/admin critical paths; and policy-critical anti-legacy checks (no runtime fallback paths in gates, SQL-authoritative runtime path, explicit feature-flag gating) are present for this phase.

excludedApproaches: Manual production deploy without gate evidence.
executionConstraints: Smoke coverage must include employee/vendor/admin critical paths.
name: CI/CD Expansion and Release Gates
rationale: Release safety controls should be finalized against complete portal and runtime baseline.
summary: Finalize CI/CD gates for build correctness, deploy safety, and release evidence.
